---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a significant expansion of the current implementation
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem statement

What is missing today?

## Proposed change

Describe the capability you want to add.

## Why it belongs in AETHER

Explain whether this belongs in the Rust kernel, a boundary layer, or supporting documentation.

## Semantic and boundary impact

How would this affect replay, derivation, explainability, or crate boundaries?

## Alternatives considered

What other options did you look at?

## Acceptance criteria

What concrete outcome would make this complete?
